$schema_note: Venue roster for /scripts/seminars-prompt.md. Each entry declares the venue, its event-list URL, default event type, tier priority, and render_mode hint. Read by Claude headless harvest weekly. The agent handles extraction; render_mode is a strategy hint for fetch-difficulty, not a parser selector. tier_priority 1 = must crawl, 2 = if budget permits, 3 = low priority, 4 = optional.

sources.name: Centre for Ethics, University of Toronto
sources.notes: Documented as most reliable single source for Toronto philosophy lectures. Ethics@Noon-ish weekly series is the workhorse.

sources.name: Jackman Humanities Institute
sources.notes: Feed pass 2026-06-11: Drupal listing is server-rendered; plain fetch suffices.

sources.name: Munk School of Global Affairs and Public Policy
Toronto Public Library Appel Salon Series
sources.notes: Feed pass 2026-06-11: /v2/events is server-rendered and fetches clean; prefer over programs-and-classes page.

sources.name: Hart House, University of Toronto
sources.notes: Covers Hart House Lecture (annual named-honorific), chapel-philosophy series, and Hart House Debates. Multiple types from one source.

sources.name: Revue Cinema
sources.notes: Most reliable cinema source for director-attendance signals.

sources.name: Hot Docs Ted Rogers Cinema
sources.notes: Most director-attendance happens during the April-May Festival window. Year-round programming has fewer Q&A events.

sources.name: International Festival of Authors (Harbourfront)
sources.notes: Festival window is October-November; year-round programming is thinner.

sources.name: The Power Plant Contemporary Art Gallery
Toronto Philosophy Cafe / Philosophy in the Park
sources.events_url: TODO - discovery method (Meetup search? FB groups? mailing list?)

sources.name: The Agora (Seminar Schools)
sources.notes: Saul-hosted outdoor philosophy gathering at Barry Zukerman Amphitheatre, Earl Bales Park. Self-source; pulls from agora page directly.

sources.name: Curated lectures (hand-maintained)
sources.notes: Hand-curated events from data/manual-events.json. Used for lectures the auto-scraper cannot reliably capture (UofT departments without public RSS, special symposia, the Agora self-source) and for archival lectures the curator wants preserved on the seminars page.

sources.name: Toronto & York Region Labour Council
sources.notes: Union action calendar. Demonstrations, rallies, pickets, strikes. Promoted from deferred_candidates.protest 2026-06.

sources.name: Toronto demonstration callouts (civic discovery)
sources.events_url: discovery - student-union and advocacy action pages plus confirmed demonstration callouts carried by local news; every record needs source_url and raw_excerpt
sources.notes: Open-discovery protest channel across the political spectrum. Promoted from deferred_candidates.protest 2026-06.

sources.name: City of Toronto Festivals and Events
sources.notes: Community events, charity walks and rides, fundraisers, neighbourhood gatherings.

sources.name: Charity and community event discovery
sources.events_url: discovery - charity rides and walks, fundraisers, community-org events in the GTA; confirm each with source_url and raw_excerpt
sources.notes: Open-discovery community channel. Captures events like charity rides that fall outside the discursive seminar roster.

deferred_candidates.$note: Categories the dialectic admitted but no concrete source has been identified yet. Surface when discovery method emerges.
conference-keynote: Open-public sessions at academic conferences hosted at UofT, York, TMU
protest: Toronto & York Region Labour Council and affiliated union action calendars
Student-union and faculty-association action pages (UofT, York, TMU, OCAD)
Advocacy and community organization event pages across the political spectrum
Confirmed demonstration callouts carried by local news outlets

$architecture: scrape_seminars.py and per-venue Python fetchers retired May 26 2026. Harvest now runs via claude -p in .github/workflows/scrape-seminars.yml. manual-events.json remains the override layer.

$render_modes.static: Plain HTML. WebFetch returns parseable content.
$render_modes.drupal: Drupal events page. Default sort may show past events first.
$render_modes.javascript: Client-side rendered. WebFetch may return sparse markup; try venue's parent base_url plus paths like /events, /whats-on, /calendar.
$render_modes.google-sites: Google Sites layout. Static-ish but embedded widgets. Parse with care.
$render_modes.rss: Native RSS feed available, prefer it.
$render_modes.ical: Native iCal feed available, prefer it.
$render_modes.api: Native JSON API endpoint, prefer it.
